get.description: Always returns 200 if the process is up. Use as a load-balancer health probe.

Returns paginated monthly production rows from `fact_production_monthly`.

Filters: `operator`, `formation`, `province`, `vm=true|false`, `from=YYYY-MM`, `to=YYYY-MM`.

Pass `group_by=operator|concession|formation|province` to aggregate rows on the fly — the response items follow the `GroupedProductionRowDto` shape (the group key field is named after the chosen `group_by`).

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Filter by operator slug (see /operators for valid values).

parameters.name: province
parameters.description: Filter by province name (matches CSV exactly, e.g. "Neuquén").

parameters.name: vm
parameters.description: Restrict to Vaca Muerta production (`vm_combined` = formation + unconventional + sub-tipo). Use "true" or "false".

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound for `date_month` (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound for `date_month` (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Aggregate on the fly instead of returning per-well rows. The grouped result includes oil/gas totals, BOE, and `active_wells`.

200.description: Default (ungrouped) response. When `group_by` is supplied, items follow `GroupedProductionRowDto` instead.

get.description: Single-row totals for the most recent month available, including BOE total, VM share of oil/gas/BOE, and the top 5 operators by BOE.
Returns one row per operator, joined to the latest month available in `agg_monthly_by_operator`. Includes BOE share from Vaca Muerta wells.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort key for the latest-month totals.

get.description: Metadata, latest-month rank, latest-month totals and YTD totals for one operator.
One point per `date_month`. Optionally filtered with `from` / `to`.
get.summary: Monthly time series for an operator

get.description: Paginated well catalog. Supports filters by operator/formation/basin/province/concession and a substring search on `sigla`.
Well metadata plus a `latest_production` block with the most recent monthly fact for this well.
Time-ordered monthly facts. Optionally filtered with `from` / `to`.
get.summary: Monthly production for a single well

get.description:
Returns **raw GeoJSON** (no `data` / `meta` envelope) so the response can be fed directly into Mapbox / MapLibre / Leaflet.

Use `bbox=west,south,east,north` for viewport-based loading.

Wells without coordinates are excluded. The `limit` caps total features per request (max 1000).

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box `west,south,east,north` in WGS84 decimal degrees. Use for viewport-based loading.

get.description: Returns raw GeoJSON. 404 if the well has no recorded coordinates.

404.description: Well missing or has no geometry.

get.summary: Single well as a GeoJSON Feature

get.description: Returns the earliest/latest months available plus a row count per table. Use this to attribute the data source on the frontend and to detect stale ingestion.

Paginated, filterable catalog of mining projects across commodities (silver, gold, uranium, copper, lithium, …). Each list item includes a small `commodity_highlights` map derived from the project's resources JSONB.

parameters.name: commodity
parameters.description: Filter by primary commodity (case-insensitive exact match).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by project status (case-insensitive exact match).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring search across project_name, operator, province.

get.description: Full project fact sheet, including raw `resources` and `reserves` JSONB exactly as the pipeline emitted them.
Project counts and aggregate resource/reserve totals per commodity.
All projects whose primary commodity matches (case-insensitive), with their raw resources/reserves attached.

parameters.name: min_resources
parameters.description: If true, only include projects that have at least one resource entry.

get.description: Raw GeoJSON (no `data` / `meta` envelope). Projects without coordinates are excluded.
Totals and breakdowns by commodity, status, and province, plus the set of source pipelines that fed the database.
Latest quotes for the tracked commodities (Silver, Gold, Copper, Uranium, Lithium). Uranium and Lithium use sector ETFs as proxies. Sourced from Yahoo Finance; 5-minute server-side cache.
Latest quote for one commodity. Case-insensitive name match against the supported set.
Argentine uranium projects from SIACAM / CNEA, with controllers, status and coordinates. Filter by `province` and / or normalized `status` slug.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by normalized status slug (case-insensitive): prospection | early_exploration | advanced_exploration | preliminary_economic_assessment | feasibility.

get.description: Monthly U3O8 spot price series (USD/lb), 1990 → present. Supports `from` / `to` date range filtering (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound on price date (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound on price date (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Current price, all-time high / low, and decade averages computed from the full monthly series.
Monthly uranium trade records split into `imports` and `exports`. Optionally filter by `year`.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter both imports and exports to a single year.

get.description: Combined snapshot: current price, total resources / historical production (CNEA), project breakdowns by status and province, and price statistics.
Imports (exporting countries → Argentina) and exports (Argentina → importing countries) for a commodity, aggregated by country and sorted by value. Filter by `year`; omit to aggregate all years.

parameters.name: mineral
parameters.description: Commodity name. Currently only uranium trade data is available; other minerals return empty flows.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter the flow to a single year. Omit to aggregate across all available years.

get.description: One row per tracked commodity series (gold, silver, copper, lithium_etf, uranium_etf) with the most recent monthly value. Sourced from Yahoo Finance (monthly snapshot fetched upstream).
Monthly value history for one commodity (`gold`, `silver`, `copper`, `lithium_etf`, `uranium_etf`).
Latest EIA-sourced energy series (Brent, WTI, Henry Hub). Returns an empty array when the EIA pipeline has not yet run — set `EIA_API_KEY` upstream and re-seed.
Filterable list of station-level fuel prices (current snapshot). Use `provincia`, `producto`, `bandera`, `from`, `to`.
For each (provincia, producto) pair, returns the latest fecha_vigencia plus min / avg / max across stations on that date. Optionally filter by `provincia` and / or `producto`.
get.summary: Latest fuel prices by province + product

get.description: Daily official (BCRA) and blue (parallel) exchange rates from bluelytics. Both sell and buy sides. Range filterable.
Latest oficial + blue (sell + buy) rates.
Monthly Baker Hughes rig count for Argentina (oil / gas / total). Currently a small placeholder dataset until the scraper stabilizes.
Most recent month's oil / gas / total rig count.

All companies — mining operators and oil & gas operators in one list — with logos, stock metadata and project counts. Filter by `type` (oil_and_gas | mining | both | all), `q`, `commodity`, `country`.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by company type. `all` (default) returns every company.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring search across company name.

parameters.name: commodity
parameters.description: Only companies with at least one project of this commodity (case-insensitive).

get.description: Companies with a stock ticker — the set the frontend renders stock cards for.
Current price and daily change for every public company, sourced from Yahoo Finance and cached for 5 minutes.

Daily (or finer) price history for one ticker over a range, plus current price, daily change and 52-week high/low. Sourced from Yahoo Finance v8 chart API, cached 5 minutes. Non-US tickers are resolved automatically (CAPX→CAPX.BA, BSK→BSK.V).

404.description: Ticker not found or no history from Yahoo.

get.description: Full profile: logo, website, stock data, mineral project portfolio (with timeline) and — for oil & gas operators — a production summary.
Every province with oil & gas or mining activity, with combined project counts and commodities. Filter by `commodity`.

parameters.name: commodity
parameters.description: Only provinces with at least one mineral project of this commodity (case-insensitive).

get.description: All provinces ranked by annual export value across petróleo / gas / minería, plus the national totals.
Unified province profile: live oil & gas production summary, mineral project portfolio, and export profile.
Monthly oil & gas production for the province (same shape as operator production). Empty for provinces with no O&G activity. Supports `from` / `to`.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound for date_month (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound for date_month (YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Annual export values for the province, by sector and product.

post.description: The data pipeline POSTs batches here. Upserts by doc_id; never overwrites editor notes. Body: { documents: Document[] }.

get.description: Paginated, filterable feed. Sort by importance (default) or recency. Filter by source_family, topic, entity (company/regulator), region, free-text q (title/deck) and a publishedAt from/to window. Returns a card-level projection (no body_text).

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Filter by entity (company or regulator), e.g. "YPF"

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Lower bound on publishedAt (ISO date/datetime, inclusive)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Upper bound on publishedAt (ISO date/datetime, inclusive)

get.description: Distinct topics, source families and top entities with counts, for filter UIs.
Returns the document and its cluster siblings (other docs sharing cluster_id).

Computed /inversiones payload: VM production, national share, active wells, operator leaderboard, production series, energy exports, breakeven headroom (live Brent from FactPrice vs. a cited breakeven reference), activity momentum (new VM wells/month), and INDEC energy trade — real energy exports, energy trade surplus (superávit) and the agro-vs-energy export crossover (cruce, with each year also as % of GDP from World Bank) — all derived from ingested data, source-cited, with as-of from the data.

post.description: Idempotent. Always returns 200 with the same body whether the email is new or already subscribed, so it cannot be used to probe who is on the list. The email is normalised (trim + lowercase) and deduped on a unique column.
post.summary: Subscribe an email to the newsletter

info.title: Petroldata.ar API
info.description:
REST API over Argentina Secretaría de Energía oil & gas production data (focus: Vaca Muerta).

## Response envelope

Every non-GeoJSON endpoint returns:

```json
{
  "data": ...,
  "meta": {
    "source": "Secretaría de Energía / datos.energia.gob.ar",
    "dataset": "Producción de petróleo y gas por pozo",
    "license": "CC-BY-4.0",
    "last_source_update": "2026-04-01",
    "last_ingested_at": "2026-05-27T14:30:00.000Z",
    "vaca_muerta_filter": "formation + unconventional + sub-tipo"
  },
  "pagination": { "page": 1, "limit": 50, "total": 1000 }
}
```

`pagination` is only present on paginated list endpoints. GeoJSON endpoints (`/geo/*`) return raw GeoJSON.

## Errors

```json
{ "error": { "code": "NOT_FOUND", "message": "Well not found: 99999" } }
```

## Units

- `oil_m3` — cubic metres of oil
- `oil_bbl` — barrels of oil (1 m³ ≈ 6.2898 bbl)
- `oil_bbl_d` — barrels per day (oil_bbl ÷ days in month)
- `gas_thousand_m3` — thousands of cubic metres of gas (Mm³)
- `gas_mcf` — thousand cubic feet of gas
- `gas_mmcf_d` — million cubic feet per day
- `gas_mm3_d` — million m³ per day
- `boe` — barrels of oil equivalent (oil_bbl + gas_boe)

## Vaca Muerta flag

`vm_combined = formation_vaca_muerta AND unconventional AND sub_resource_type ∈ {Shale, Shale Oil, …}` — pre-computed in the Python pipeline.

tags.name: operators
tags.description: Operator catalog, detail, and time series

tags.name: data-status
tags.description: Ingestion freshness and table row counts

tags.name: minerals
tags.description: Mining project database (v2): silver, gold, uranium, copper, lithium fact sheets

tags.name: prices
tags.description: Commodity prices, energy prices, and gas station fuel prices

tags.name: macro
tags.description: Macroeconomic context: USD/ARS exchange rates and Argentina rig count

operator.description: The group key. Field name varies with `group_by`: `operator`, `concession`, `formation`, or `province`.

dataset.example: Producción de petróleo y gas por pozo

vm_share_boe.description: Share of total BOE in the latest month coming from Vaca Muerta wells.

coordinates.description: [longitude, latitude] in WGS84, per GeoJSON spec.

dataset.example: Producción de petróleo y gas por pozo

commodity_highlights.description: Per-commodity headline numbers extracted from resources/reserves for at-a-glance comparison.

proxy.description: True when the ticker is a sector ETF proxy rather than a direct commodity feed.

commodity_highlights.description: Per-commodity headline numbers extracted from resources/reserves for at-a-glance comparison.

resources.description: Raw resources JSONB, as extracted by the pipeline.

reserves.description: Raw reserves JSONB, as extracted by the pipeline.

resources_year.description: Reporting year of the resources/reserves table (when present in the source).

geology.description: Free-text geology sections extracted from the deck.

example.regional: The Laguna Salada Project is located near the western edge of the Cretaceous San Jorge Basin…
example.deposit: The mineralization at Laguna Salada is contained in flat-topped mesas…

commodity_prices.description: Live commodity prices for the project's primary commodity and any by-products we track.

stock.description: Live stock quote for the operator's parent company, if publicly traded and mapped.

resource_totals.description: Sum of resource values across projects, keyed by category + unit (e.g. measured_kOz).

reserve_totals.description: Sum of reserve values across projects.

year.description: The requested year, or null when aggregated across all years.

imports.description: Exporting countries → Argentina, sorted by value descending.

exports.description: Argentina → importing countries, sorted by value descending.

available_years.description: Years with trade data for this mineral (for year-slider bounds).

projects.description: Mineral project portfolio (empty for pure O&G operators).

stock.description: Live quote for public companies, else null.

vm_pct.description: Share of BOE from Vaca Muerta (0–1).

documents.description: Array of pipeline Documents to upsert (keyed on doc_id).

status.description: Always "subscribed" — the response never reveals whether the email already existed.

email.description: Subscriber email. Normalised (trimmed + lowercased) before storage.
